docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-08-1993, CONTINUED TO JAN-04-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR STATUS OF STIPULATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF I.C.ISAACS & CO., A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ABOUKARAM, MOHAMED, IND & DBA LA MODA SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-08-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-09-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-19-1993
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-04-1994, CONTINUED TO AUG-03-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR JUDGMENT/DISMISSAL. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ABOUKARAM, MOHAMED, IND & DBA LA MODA

STIPULATION AND ORDER STIPULATION FOR SETTLEMENT CASE BE SETTLED FOR PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF $1877.96 TO BE PAID TO PLTF'S ATTY BY DEFT IN MONTHLY PAYMENT OF $200.00 UNTIL PAID. PLTF MAY TAKE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT UPON DEFAULT OF PAYMENTS AND AFTER GIVING 10 DAYS' NOTICE TO DEFT TO ALLOW DEFT TIME TO CURE THE DEFAULT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
